config.script:
# Sends a message to navigationExpandCollapse to toggle the 'expanded' custom
	# property on the Main view (which is passed down to this view via params).
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("navigationExpandCollapse",payload={},scope="page")

# Sends a message to navigationExpandCollapse to toggle the 'expanded' custom
	# property on the Main view (which is passed down to this view via params).
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("navigationExpandCollapse",payload={},scope="page")

# Sends a message to 'navigation' handler on Main view to navigate
	# to a different 'page' (updating the viewPath of the main embedded
	# view on Main Sm and Main Lg).
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("navigation",payload={'page':0},scope="page")

# Sends a message to 'navigation' handler on Main view to navigate
	# to a different 'page' (updating the viewPath of the main embedded
	# view on Main Sm and Main Lg).
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("navigation",payload={'page':1},scope="page")

# Sends a message to 'navigation' handler on Main view to navigate
	# to a different 'page' (updating the viewPath of the main embedded
	# view on Main Sm and Main Lg).
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("navigation",payload={'page':4},scope="page")

# Sends a message to 'navigation' handler on Main view to navigate
	# to a different 'page' (updating the viewPath of the main embedded
	# view on Main Sm and Main Lg).
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("navigation",payload={'page':2},scope="page")

# Sends a message to 'navigation' handler on Main view to navigate
	# to a different 'page' (updating the viewPath of the main embedded
	# view on Main Sm and Main Lg).

	system.perspective.sendMessage("navigation",payload={'page':3},scope="page")

transforms.code:
# If user is not authenticated, return None. If user is authenticated,
	# then create a byte array from the 'profileimage' bytes, write the
	# bytes to a 'file', use imghdr.what to attempt to determine the image
	# file type, create the 'source' which contains the image bytes encoded
	# in base64, close the file, and then return the 'source' string.
	
	if value['authenticated']:
		from com.inductiveautomation.ignition.common import Base64
		import array
		import StringIO
		import imghdr
		
		data = array.array('b',value['user'].profileimage)
		f = StringIO.StringIO()
		f.write(data)
		
		fileType = imghdr.what(f)
		source = "data:image/{};base64,{}".format(fileType,Base64.encodeBytes(data))
		f.close()
		
		return source
	else:
		return None

props.path: Building Automation Demo/Page/User Config/Framework/Built In Icon

config.script:
# Sets expanded custom property to true, which increases the height (basis)
	# of the Options container (which reveals the Change Theme button and Log In
	# button if user is not authenticated, or the Settings button and Log Out
	# button if the user is authenticated).
	
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("User").custom.expanded = True

# Sets expanded custom property to false, which decreases the height (basis)
	# of the Options container.
	
	self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("User").custom.expanded = False
